overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a yellow plaid shirt walking through a futuristic urban downtown at dusk. The scene features wet streets reflecting neon lights, a distinctive red office building, massive megastructures with red warning lights, and light pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: character begins walking forward from the crosswalk into the street
futuristic yellow taxi drives past on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: character in yellow plaid shirt walks forward from the crosswalk, navigating through light pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic yellow taxi driving through the wet intersection
pedestrian in red beanie walking alongside the character

entered.detail: distinctive red and white multi-story office building with horizontal windows and flat roof
tall black traffic signal pole showing red light
massive futuristic corporate tower with red warning lights looming in the background
white and red striped construction barriers lining the street edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection during dusk. The character stands at a crosswalk near a distinctive red office building while a yellow taxi passes by. The wet asphalt reflects the street lights, and a massive megastructure tower dominates the distant skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching megastructure archway with tram tracks

events.description: character looks up toward the megastructure while continuing to walk forward
passing by a burning barrel on the sidewalk providing warmth

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily toward the massive megastructure, glancing up at its imposing scale

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on the sidewalk next to a burning barrel with belongings

entered.detail: metal tracks embedded in the wet asphalt street surface
metal barrel with open fire providing warmth on the concrete sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the street with the red building now on the left, the character approaches the massive megastructure. Metal tram tracks run down the center of the wet road, and a homeless person sits near a burning barrel on the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: underneath the megastructure archway at intersection

events.description: character walks under the massive archway of the megastructure
character turns right at the intersection beneath the megastructure
cream-colored futuristic van drives through the intersection

agents.ego_description: character turns right at the intersection under the megastructure arch and continues down a new street

notable_agents.action: cream-colored futuristic van driving through the wet intersection

entered.detail: massive concrete and metal archway of the megastructure with red warning lights underneath
low-rise building with blue paneling and graffiti on the facade

segments.scene_description: The character passes underneath the massive archway of the megastructure, entering a darker, sheltered space. After turning right at the intersection, a cream-colored van drives past, and a blue commercial building with graffiti comes into view on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with shops and holographic billboards

events.description: passing by illuminated street vendors and shop fronts with neon lighting
large holographic billboard becomes prominently visible on the left

agents.ego_description: character walks along the commercial sidewalk passing pedestrians and street vendors with illuminated stalls

notable_agents.action: street vendor standing near illuminated stall with green awning
child in brown outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with red and blue graphics mounted on top of a tall building
street vendors with illuminated stalls and colorful awnings lining the sidewalk
raised highway or monorail track structure running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: Walking down a commercial street lined with shops, the character passes street vendors with illuminated stalls. A massive holographic billboard glows in the distance, and elevated transit tracks run parallel to the street. The crowd density increases slightly as the character moves through this busier commercial zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic downtown district that transitions from an open city intersection into a dense, neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins at a crosswalk beside a distinctive red office building, where wet asphalt reflects the dusk light as a yellow taxi passes and a massive megastructure looms in the distance. As the character walks forward, the scene shifts toward the base of this tower, passing metal tram tracks and a burning barrel on the sidewalk before the camera glides underneath the megastructure's massive archway. The environment then opens into a darker sheltered space where a cream-colored van drives past a graffiti-covered blue building, leading the camera to turn right toward a busier street. Finally, the shot moves through a vibrant commercial zone lined with illuminated vendor stalls and elevated transit tracks, heading toward a glowing holographic billboard as the crowd density increases.
